title: LegalDivision
description: A practice division of the NYC Law Department (Office of the Corporation Counsel) — the unit that handles a body of the City's legal work (e.g. Tax & Bankruptcy, Tort, Labor & Employment, Affirmative Litigation). Canonical schema reconciling 'LAW Divisions' (4se9-mk53) and the 'Legal Divisions' page on nyc.gov/site/law.

url.description: Division page on the Law Department site.
